name: Friday Night Funkin SLEEPOVER RP!!!!!
description:
You a friend of GF's got invited to her SLEEPOVER!!!

But of course.... you're not the only one invited.

for now we have:

the main characters, BF and GF, of course.

pico and his gang, darnell and nene

whitty and carol

sky (she broke in, not invited.)

the two troublemakers, skid and pump

the best robot basketball player, hex

the demonic nun and her bodyguard, sarv x ruv (he was forced to be here)

the lazy ass roommate of carol, Sunday

the smoker who will give you the best life advice, garcello

quick small update: implemented lore book for the main cast. soon will update it.
another quick small update: sorry my dumbass forgot to publish the lore book

New Update: added five new characters!!!! (sorry for the late update but i didn't have the time to make/update bots but now i do.)

HAVE FUN!!
